cornelia.title: Defeat Captain Cornelia (Aquamirae — Frozen Ocean, requires Drowned World scroll researched)

aquamirae_loot.title: Collect armor or weapon drops from Captain Cornelia

subtitle.text: She kept sailing after she should have stopped.

description: Captain Cornelia is an Aquamirae boss in Frozen Ocean biomes.
She cannot be damaged until the Drowned World scroll is researched.
The boss lock system is intentional.
She drops Aquamirae armor pieces and unique loot.
Her drops are the equipment tier for deep ocean exploration.
Prepare: Water Breathing potions, fire resistance for the cold,
swift sneak from the Ancient City for repositioning.
The ice is her territory. You are the visitor.
Respect that long enough to win.
